flow_summary.step_1: CSV Reader loads app reviews and support emails.
flow_summary.step_3: Bug Analyzer enriches bug items with technical details.
flow_summary.step_4: Feature Extractor enriches feature request items.
flow_summary.step_5: Ticket Creator builds structured tickets and checks duplicates.
flow_summary.step_6: Quality Critic scores ticket quality and revises if needed.
flow_summary.step_7: Outputs are saved to CSV and SQLite with metrics.
